name: Test Plugin
description: Developer test plugin — exercises every PluginContext API feature: toolbar UI slot (button opens a modal panel with live store snapshot), statusbar UI slot (live hook-fire counter), three Command Palette commands (say hello / log config / reset store), ctx.store set/get/delete/clear with session counter, all four hook events (stream:beforeConnect transforms stream, stream:afterConnect observes final URL, player:progressSaved writes last position to store, player:markedWatched counts per-item view history), config variables (string color / boolean toggle), React via window.__HW_React (no bundled React copy), and teardown that unsubscribes all four hooks.
author: HephaestWatch

variables.label: Badge Color
variables.description: CSS color value for the statusbar hook counter badge
